diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -21,10 +21,8 @@
             nn.Flatten()

         )

         

-        self.direction_embedding = nn.Embedding(4, 16)

-        

         self.linear = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(64 * 7 * 7 + 16, features_dim),

+            nn.Linear(64 * 7 * 7 + 4, features_dim),

             nn.ReLU()

         )

 

@@ -40,8 +38,9 @@
         

         cnn_out = self.cnn(x)

         

-        direction = observations["direction"].long().view(-1)

-        dir_emb = self.direction_embedding(direction)

-        

-        features = torch.cat([cnn_out, dir_emb], dim=1)

+        direction = observations["direction"].float()

+        if direction.dim() == 1:

+            direction = direction.view(1, -1)

+            

+        features = torch.cat([cnn_out, direction], dim=1)

         return self.linear(features)
